transcript.text:
(What is this...)
(No matter how much I think about it...)
This is crazy
(A dish that makes you speechless)
(Here's today's crazy menu)
(Mungtigi*) *Fresh Korean beef sashimi
(Hefty) Thanks for the meal!
(Tasting the local mungtigi in Seoul)
It's good
It's so yummy
(It's crazy) So yummy
(We'll start digging in this hefty amount of mungtigi)
(Bangi-dong, Songpa-gu, Seoul)
Hello, everyone
I'm at Bangi-dong right now
For the first time in a long time,

I'm here to have some mungtigi
(Can barely recall the time I had one) I think it's been close to a year? Maybe under that
Anyway, it feels like it's been forever
They serve fresh mungtigi butchered every morning
delivered from
(Anyway, they're fresh!) Hampyeong, Jeollanam-do like this!
("Hampyeong Yukhoe" - A Mungtigi restaurant in Bangi-dong) Tada! We're at "Hampyeong Yukhoe"
I guess it's called "Hampyeong Yukhoe" because they bring the beef from Hampyeong
Let's head inside
Hello!
(Let's take a look)
(There are various dishes besides mungtigi) Oh, beef sashimi is mungtigi!
(Getting out of control again) They have yukhoe! Yukhoe with tangtangi(live octopus)
Uni(sea urchin)!
(Mungtigi and sea urchin? Wow) Beef sashimi with sea urchin sounds awesome!
Excuse me!

Is the mungtigi served from
a cow butchered this morning?
- Of course! We're always... - Oh, really?
For yukhoe, we age it for a day before serving
That sounds fresh
Hmm, I can't decide...
(The return of the menu war) I was only going to get mungtigi but everything looks good
(Tempting) (The octopus in tangtangi is the mudflat octopus)
Ooh, octopus! That sounds...
Then...
(Mungtigi) I'll get 6 beef tartare
I'll get 1 yukhoe tangtangi
and I'll grab a yukhoe as well
(Not over yet) And
I'll get 3 uni!
3 uni? Okay

(What's this?) Thank you
(Jeolla-do-style clean ox blood soup) In Jeolla-do, people serve it clean like this
(While Tzuyang enjoys the soup...) It's good!
(There's our beef that took the express bus from Hampyeong since early morning)
(Here's the mouth-opening table filled with scarlet dishes)
(We also have the sea urchin!)
(Here's your beef) Wow, thank you!
- I'll leave them here - Thank you
(With sea urchin to pair the beef with...)
- This is on the house - Wow, thank you!
(And sushi rice on the house!) Wow, thank you!
(The table is ready)
Looks yummy!
Thanks for the meal
Look at this bright red color! It looks so good
Let's dip it in the oil sauce first

That texture though...!
How do I put this? It's super chewy
It's so chewy that
it's making crispy sounds
Wait a second, should I
(Should I make some sushi first?) top this on sushi rice first?
Top wasabi
(Customizing mungtigi sushi however she wants) Should I top ssamjang* for a few of them? Sounds yummy *Dipping sauce in Korea
(You can tell right away that it's thick) Wow, it's so thick! The beef slice is super thick
Tada! There's our sushi
Wait, this is
the mungtigi sauce!
Every mungtigi restaurant has this sauce
Their sauce
is sweet and sour gochujang* flavored *Korean red pepper paste
Yum!

I'll try dipping it into this
(Let's make it sour this time) A big dip... Is that too much?
Wow, this mungtigi's texture is amazing!
It definitely has a different...
kind of texture compared to beef sashimi and yukhoe
How do I put this? Beef sashimi is pretty tender
But mungtigi is pretty
crispy?
It's so good
The texture is what differentiates it from other raw beef!
They have side dishes here! Baek-kimchi* *White kimchi
Wow! It's so big!
Let's put it here
Their kimchi is good
I left out something important!
(Sea Urchin & Beef Sashimi Mukbang in "Hannammisu") There was a restaurant in Hannam-dong

where I had sea urchin with beef tartare together!
(Even had a yolk for a perfect trio!) I'll dip this in the yolk
I enjoyed that so much
and the secret
(This fella) was this yolk!
(Whisk whisk)
(Is this the yellow heaven?) Dipping it in the yolk made it phenomenal
(Taste of heaven)
But this one feels really different
They taste similar but
the texture is completely different
(But they both taste amazing) Should I dig in uni and order a lot more?
Top it like this... Wow, looks good!
Wow...
(Amazing) So good!
It tastes even better if you top a bit of wasabi

Next! Yukhoe*! *Beef tartare
Let's taste the yukhoe as it is
Wow, their yukhoe is so fresh
(It's as fresh as mungtigi) Yukhoe...
So good
(A few bites finished everything) Wait... I think it'll be gone in no time
Oh right!
I made a fool of myself
(Yukhoe sushi is the root of all meat sushi) We also have yukhoe sushi!
Can't believe I forgot
(Oh my) It's crazy
Wrapping yukhoe in mungtigi
I can tell it's very fresh
The fresher it is,
the chewier it gets
It's breathtaking

(That's a serious exclamation) Gosh, so good!
Let's save on uni, I'll put just half of it
Wasabi
Should I top another slice of mungtigi?
(We thought you were saving it) Wait, I forgot to have sushi!
Let's dip this in soy sauce
It's even yummy with rice
Wasabi!
(We gotta save on mungtigi...) I shouldn't be eating this quick
It's an expensive, gourmet dish
(Digging in mungtigi) I love how I can dig in like this
Oh, I had seaweed!
(It's an all-rounder for sure) Wow, it tastes good with seaweed too!
Top a bit of uni
Wasabi
Bam!

It's definitely good
but uni
(Uni is best when served by itself) tastes better when it's by itself
(You're even having it with radish kimchi...?) Does this... Is this weird?
(But why though) It's pretty good!
(At this point, this mungtigi is an all-rounder)
Tangtangi!
(It's at death's door) Honestly, I'm not good at eating live octopus
so I was going to eat when they become weaker
- (Ahhhhhh!) - I'll pour the yolk on you!
(The yolk is the highlight - Yukhoe Tangtangi) I think it's almost dead
I'm kind of scared of this octopus
(It's still alive and kicking...) That's scary
(You're more... Never mind) Why are you so vigorous? I won't eat you
The octopus is
soft

Finishing 3 slices at once
The yukhoe is amazing
(A yukhoe trio!)
What's missing here
is whenever
you have a dish like yukhoe, mungtigi, and sashimi
(Soju is a must) you need to pair it with alcohol!
I want to have this with a drink at home
If I knew yukhoe was this good, I would have ordered more...
(Thanos wouldn't be too happy with this proportion) I messed up the balance... I finished the yukhoe
Wait, the rush hour
(Dinner time is approaching...) is nearby, so I can't really order much
I thought maybe I could
order some mungtigi to go
I'll get 2 servings of mungtigi packed and order 2 yukhoe
(A rather transparent big picture) Listen, I didn't scheme this...

(Happy thinking she'll have round 2 at home) I'll get these 2 servings of mungtigi packed
Can I get 2 more orders of yukhoe?
Seaweed
and baek-kimchi!
(Yukhoe is here) Wow, thank you!
(Yukhoe is even better as it's served fresh!) It looks so yummy! I love it
Fresh ones are definitely better
(Look how aesthetic this yukhoe is)
This time, I gotta work on the balance
Dip it in oil sauce
Come here, you
It's baek-kimchi this time
I gotta eat it with a spoon
(Don't tell me even ssamjang tastes good together) Ssamjang sounds odd
(I'm curious though) Should I try it?
Why is it good?

(Ssamjang was a master sauce) Now that I think about it, we dip grilled meat in ssamjang
(No need to worry about doing the dishes)
(Ms. Tzu is finishing everything silently)
I can't believe this
It's usually a group of 2 that orders a serving to pair it with drinks
I think it's at least 10 servings she had including the sushi!
(Meanwhile, the restaurant got crowded) There are a lot of customers now, so
it's getting crowded
so I'll finish everything asap!
Quickly!
(We can't miss this beauty though...)
Looks good!
Top uni
and cover it!
So good!
(Apparently, a cow responds to this bell) I heard you hear a "moo" when you click this!

I'll try ordering some pop!
(Who mooight you be?)
Thank you
Mungtigi is served with freshly butchered cow
And they're usually butchered on weekdays
So it's hard to find mungtigi served on the weekends
(They work with a slaughterhouse in Jeonnam!) Apparently, they butcher cows on Saturdays
in Jeollanam-do
So you can have mungtigi on Saturdays too!
You can visit from Monday to Saturday
But the meat
(It takes time to get delivered) is delivered on the express bus every day
so they're available only after 5 p.m.!
(Finally establishing the right balance)
(Tzunos is definitely strong) It's almost a perfect balance!
And if you finish everything in a bite?

(Done!)
(Not really...)
(The finishing touch)
Last bite!
Tada
(Done)
(Another day of great mukbang...) Wow, I had such a great meal
This octopus is on the house! Have it later
Oh really?
(Parboiled in the ox blood soup also offered on the house) It's parboiled in the octopus ox blood soup
- Oh really? - Yeah, try it later
Thank you!
- You're amazing! - (All this food on the house makes you more amazing)
(It's time for round 2 with the mungtigi) I'll go have some mungtigi with soju!
Again, thanks for a great meal!
(And Tzuyang drank more after that...)
